stress_signatures: Picked too late or grown too hot and dry, more of the crop turns fiery — Padrón's charm is that most stay mild, an occasional one hot.
Flower drop in a cold root zone cuts the continuous small-fruit set this cultivar is grown for.
harvest_markers: Pick small and green — 4–6 cm — for the mild, blistered-in-oil tapa; size up only if a buyer wants the hotter, riper fruit.
Harvest continuously; frequent picking keeps the plant setting new pods.

story.he: פלפלי פדרון — הפלפל הגלייסיאני הקטן שאוכלים מטוגן בשמן ומלח: רובם עדינים, ומדי פעם אחד חריף. נקטפים קטנים וירוקים.
story.en: Padrón Peppers — the small Galician frying pepper: blistered in oil and salt, most mild with the occasional hot one. Picked small and green, sold by the handful to chefs.
